clips.title: The Rain
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, melancholic grade. A rain-soaked empty street at dusk, grey light, puddles. A person stands alone in the rain, heartbroken, shoulders slumped, face crumpling with grief, rain mixing with tears. A person in a soaked coat. Cool grey light, falling rain, heartbroken mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Letter
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, melancholic grade. A dim quiet room, soft grey window light, a person sitting on the floor against a wall. They hold a letter, heartbroken, tears welling, a hand pressed to their mouth, overcome with sorrow. A person in home clothes. Soft cool light, deep shadow, heartbroken mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Departure
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, melancholic grade. A train station platform, a train pulling away, grey overcast light, steam. A person stands watching the train leave, heartbroken, hand half-raised, tears in their eyes, unable to speak. A person in a coat. Cool muted light, drifting steam, heartbroken mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Empty Chair
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, melancholic grade. A quiet restaurant table set for two, a candle, one chair empty, warm but lonely light. A person sits alone looking at the empty chair, heartbroken, eyes glistening, a hand resting on the untouched place setting. A person in nice clothes. Warm dim light, soft shadow, heartbroken mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Room
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, melancholic grade. A dim bedroom in the early evening, soft blue light through the curtains. A person sits on the edge of the bed, heartbroken, head bowed into their hands, shoulders shaking gently with quiet grief. A person in casual clothes. Soft cool blue light, deep shadow, heartbroken mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Shore
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, melancholic grade. A grey empty beach at dusk, cold surf, overcast sky. A person stands alone at the waterline, heartbroken, arms wrapped around themselves, staring at the horizon with a grief-stricken face. A person in a coat. Cool muted light, cold surf, heartbroken mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
